message:
🌱 Add open-webui: feat: Support ollama's keep_alive request parameter mission (#1426)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "open-webui-596-feat-support-ollama-s-keep-alive-request-parameter",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "open-webui: feat: Support ollama's keep_alive request parameter",
+    "description": "feat: Support ollama's keep_alive request parameter. Requested by 10+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current open-webui deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your open-webui version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui\nhelm list -n open-webui 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working open-webui installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review open-webui configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant open-webui configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui\nkubectl get configmap -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=open-webui\n```\nOllama unloads models after 5 minutes by default. A new parameter, `keep_alive`, allows the user to set a custom value.\nIt would be nice to have an option in the UI where a value for this parameter can be set."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for feat: Support ollama's keep_alive request parameter",
+        "description": "The change supports the new KeepAlive property from Ollama which keeps the model loaded for quicker response. https://github.com/ollama/ollama/pull/2146\n\nThe change includes\n\n1. Adding a new Keep Alive in the Settings > Advanced.\n2. The value being empty is default, in which case nothing is sent to chat/generate API\n3. If the value is set then the value is fetched from settings and sent to ollama when calling chat/generate API as `keep_alive`\n\nTODO:\r\n\nRelated issue #596\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui\nkubectl get events -n open-webui --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"feat: Support ollama's keep_alive request parameter\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The change supports the new KeepAlive property from Ollama which keeps the model loaded for quicker response. https://github.com/ollama/ollama/pull/2146\n\nThe change includes\n\n1. Adding a new Keep Alive in the Settings > Advanced.\n2. The value being empty is default, in which case nothing is sent to chat/generate API\n3.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "open-webui",
+      "community",
+      "ai-app",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "open-webui"
+    ],

+      "pr": "https://github.com/open-webui/open-webui/pull/721"
+    },

+  },
